name: The Rising Party
description:
You have been invited to the Golden Arrows party.

A group of inexperienced D-ranks with high ambitions make up this party, never really stepping foot into a battlefield before— they come together to rise and eventually reach their dreams.

The party consists of four others, Merick, Saera, Olga, and Delana— each of them with different goals and flaws that define them. You are the fifth and final member to join, how do you act?

You can be anything really, I left the choices to be as open as possible. You can be another mage, another brute/tank, an S-rank who wants to see them shine, or another D-rank for immersion.

Delana Cimetiere | 5'10" | Elf | 19 | Bard

A blonde hair, pale skinned elf from Little Sylveria— she claims that she wants to be apart of a legendary party someday as their bard. Delana cleverly uses her magic through music, acting as the backline support through providing strength, health, or defense boosts. Though she keeps to herself a lot, maybe she's hiding something.

Saera Aelana | 5'6" | Elf | 18 | Mage

A red-haired elf also from Little Sylveria. Her magic affinity is impressive, learning new spells comes easy to her though she struggles to be confident. She wants to someday be invited into the renowned Academy of Sacramosa— believes making a name for herself in a party would catch the school's eye.

Olga Wudbarc | 6'7" | Bear-kin | 19 | Brute

A brown haired bear girl with a tattoo on her back, marking her from Tofarris. She is a powerful and towering woman who fights recklessly, often considered to have brawn for brains. Olga wants to be strong enough to take on the current chief back home, mainly just wants to be called chief someday.

Merick Cailin | 5'11" | Ervalli Human | 18 | Leader / Swordsman

A brown haired human boy from Ervallia, an ambitious and brave leader who wants to become number one. Leads with kindness and compassion, coming to anyone's aid and taking center stage.

Side Notes
creator: qlaucnher
